common.footer: We build websites and systems that shorten decisions, capture demand and automate routine work.
common.nextHubText: We study the business and customer journey first, then choose the right features, design and technical connections.
common.homeText: The right website makes decisions easier and helps the business manage demand, sales and time. Choose your field to see what changes.
common.website: Do you already have a website?
common.industryIntro: Every industry loses customers at a different point. Choose your field to see where decisions stall and how the right website removes that friction.
common.readyText: Tell us where sales, bookings or team workflows slow down. We’ll outline a focused way forward.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The address is incorrect or the page has moved.

contact.title: Tell Us the Friction
contact.description: Tell us where enquiries, orders or team time are being lost. We’ll help identify the digital step most likely to make a practical difference.

about.title: We Start by Listening
about.description: We first learn where customers hesitate and where the team loses time. Then we build the website or system around that specific problem.

items.question: How is the budget set?
items.answer: Pages, functionality and integrations shape the cost. After a short discovery call, you receive a staged estimate.

items.question: When will we see a working version?
items.answer: Timing depends on scope. Before work begins, we agree on clear stages and the result you will see at each one.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: We monitor performance, resolve issues and use real behaviour data to prioritise the next improvements.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I agree to the processing of my data to discuss this project.
form.required: Complete the required fields and accept the terms.
form.success: Thank you. We will contact you shortly.

construction.title: Simplify Property Sales
construction.subtitle: Buyers decide sooner because the project is clear. The sales team receives enquiries from people who already understand the details.
construction.cardText: Buyers find the right unit faster, while sales teams receive better-qualified enquiries.
problems: Buyers search through posts and files for basic details
Checking availability still requires a call
Price and status differ between channels
Sales teams answer the same questions every day
results: Enquiries come from buyers who already reviewed the terms
Decision-making information is available at the right moment
Managers spend less time repeating basic details
Transparent information makes the project easier to trust

faq.question: Can availability update from our CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. Your team updates the status once, and buyers see current availability without calling to confirm it.

faq.question: Can we add a 3D tour?
faq.answer: Yes. Existing 3D, 360° or video material can sit naturally within the project journey and help buyers understand the space.

construction.description: A developer website with unit selection, live availability, meeting booking and CRM connectivity.

tourism.title: Interest Becomes Bookings
tourism.subtitle: Travellers decide without a long message thread, while the business keeps direct bookings in a channel it controls.
tourism.cardText: Travellers choose an itinerary and complete the booking directly on your website.
problems: Tour details disappear inside posts and messages
Travellers cannot compare offers quickly
Every booking needs manual confirmation
International guests leave when essential details are unclear
results: Travellers stay with your brand from interest to booking
Complete details reduce repetitive conversations
Payment completes while intent is still high
Localised offers give international guests more confidence

faq.question: Can customers pay online?
faq.answer: Yes. The payment journey can match your market and provider, allowing customers to complete a booking in one flow.

faq.question: Does AI create the entire tour?
faq.answer: It only works from your real tours and rules. AI helps customers choose; it does not invent services you cannot deliver.

tourism.description: A travel website with tours, itineraries, online booking, payments and AI-assisted planning.

ecommerce.title: Simplify Online Sales
ecommerce.subtitle: Customers find the right product and complete an order without unnecessary friction. Your team manages every order in one place.
ecommerce.cardText: Manage every step from product discovery to delivery in one connected store.
problems: Orders get lost across different chats
Customers cannot tell whether an item is available
The team retypes the same order details
A difficult purchase sends customers to another store
results: Customers order outside business hours
Order details reach the team without retyping
A simple account makes repeat purchases easier
Sales data shows what customers actually choose

faq.question: Can it connect to our stock system?
faq.answer: Yes. Where the existing system supports it, stock updates once and the team no longer maintains two separate records.

faq.question: Will mobile checkout be fast?
faq.answer: Yes. The mobile purchase is planned first, keeping fields and steps to the minimum customers actually need.

ecommerce.description: An online store with fast search, simple payment, delivery integration and actionable sales analytics.

healthcare.title: Simplify Patient Booking
healthcare.subtitle: Patients find answers and available times themselves. Reception handles fewer repetitive calls and manages visits with less pressure.
healthcare.cardText: Patients choose a doctor and time themselves, reducing calls for the clinic team.
problems: Patients must call just to check availability
Doctor differences remain unclear without useful profiles
Reception repeats the same answers throughout the day
Manual reminders take time and may arrive late
results: Patients find common answers without calling
Timely reminders reduce forgotten appointments
Transparent profiles make doctor selection easier
Online booking leaves reception time for complex needs
ai: Finding the right service or specialist

faq.question: Does AI diagnose patients?
faq.answer: No. It can find clinic information and help with booking, but every medical decision remains with a qualified doctor.

faq.question: Can the system send reminders?
faq.answer: Yes. Patients receive a timely text or email, while reception no longer sends every reminder by hand.

healthcare.description: A clinic website with doctor profiles, live schedules, online booking and responsible reminders.

ai-automation.title: Save Team Time
ai-automation.subtitle: Repetitive work runs automatically and enquiries stop disappearing between systems. The team keeps its time for decisions that need people.
ai-automation.cardText: Routine tasks run automatically, leaving the team focused on decisions that need people.
problems: Enquiries disappear between chat and email
Leads reach the right person too late
One report requires several files to be combined manually
The same data is entered into multiple systems
results: Each enquiry enters the right process immediately
Repeatable steps run without constant staff involvement
Every lead has a visible owner and status
Reports bring decision-ready information together on time

faq.question: What should we automate first?
faq.answer: Start with work that happens often, consumes visible time and follows clear rules. That makes the first result easier to measure.

faq.question: Can this integrate with our CRM?
faq.answer: If the system offers a secure connection, data can move without retyping. We confirm access and limitations before proposing the integration.

ai-automation.description: AI assistants, CRM connections and automated workflows for sales, support and reporting.

construction.whyText: A professional platform turns a development into a clear choice and gives the sales team better-prepared enquiries.
whyReasons: Buyers find every detail in one place.
Available and sold units remain transparent.
International investors understand the project clearly.
construction.benefitsText: When buyers review the details themselves, the sales team speaks with people who are closer to a decision.
construction.featuresText: Interactive selection and precise information reduce uncertainty and make sending an enquiry easier.
featureResults: Buyers independently find the right building, floor and unit.
Area, price and status filters shorten the search.
Decision-making information is available before the first call.
Photography, plans and terms stay together on one page.
Interested buyers can schedule the next step immediately.
Each enquiry connects to the right project and manager.
International investors review the project in their language.
construction.advantageText: A structured digital experience presents the project as a more organised, trustworthy and accessible offer.
advantages: Buyers get answers before moving to a competitor.
Project quality is visible from the first screen.
The sales team handles fewer repetitive questions.

tourism.whyText: A travel platform connects inspiration, information and booking while reducing dependence on social media.
whyReasons: Travellers discover tours without lengthy messages.
International guests receive complete localised information.
Interest moves directly into a booking journey.
tourism.benefitsText: Clear itineraries and simple booking reduce manual communication and create more opportunities for a direct customer relationship.
tourism.featuresText: Each tool helps travellers choose sooner and gives the business a more organised way to receive demand.
featureResults: Tours become easy to discover through categories and details.
Travellers quickly choose the right date and destination.
Interested guests complete booking in one place.
Payment brings the booking journey to completion.
Routes and important stops become visually clear.
International customers evaluate the offer in their language.
AI-assisted planning makes relevant tours easier to find.
tourism.advantageText: Advantage comes from more than photography: fast choice, trusted information and simple booking matter.
advantages: Guests find answers without waiting for a message.
Localised content builds confidence with international travellers.
Your own platform keeps demand and brand attention with you.

ecommerce.whyText: An online store is more than product pages—it connects discovery, payment, orders and sales data.
whyReasons: Customers find products at any hour.
Orders begin without waiting for an employee.
Stock and orders move through one process.
ecommerce.benefitsText: Fast checkout and a clear catalogue reduce abandoned choices and make order management easier for the team.
ecommerce.featuresText: From catalogue to analytics, each part strengthens customer decisions and business control.
featureResults: Products stay organised in clear categories.
Customers find the right item with less searching.
A decision becomes an order without unnecessary steps.
Customers complete the purchase in the same experience.
Order status stays clear for customers and the team.
Repeat purchases and order history become easier.
Sales data supports more informed business decisions.
ecommerce.advantageText: Customers often choose the store where finding products, trusting details and paying require less effort.
advantages: Fast search reduces reasons to visit another store.
Transparent price and stock simplify decisions.
Organised orders improve the quality of service.

healthcare.whyText: A clinic platform helps patients choose a doctor, service and time while reducing repetitive calls for reception.
whyReasons: Patients schedule visits at a convenient time.
International patients receive complete localised information.
healthcare.benefitsText: Online information and booking reduce repetitive questions and give patients more control over the process.
healthcare.featuresText: Every tool supports easier choice, transparent information and a more manageable administrative workload.
featureResults: Patients compare specialty, experience and availability.
Service descriptions create clearer expectations before a visit.
Patients choose appointment times without calling.
Available times appear in one clear schedule.
Patients select the most convenient branch.
Reminders reduce the chance of forgetting an appointment.
AI handles administrative questions without replacing a doctor.
healthcare.advantageText: Trusted information, fast booking and localised content present the clinic as a more organised choice.
advantages: Patients find answers outside reception hours.
Transparent profiles create a professional first impression.
Simple booking reduces reasons to choose another clinic.

ai-automation.whyText: AI and automation reduce repetitive work, connect systems and preserve team time for decisions that need people.
whyReasons: Requests are collected in an organised way.
Less data is copied manually between systems.
People step in when judgement is required.
ai-automation.benefitsText: Connected workflows speed up responses, organise leads and bring process control into one place.
ai-automation.featuresText: Tools are selected for a specific process, not simply to display technology.
featureResults: Answers common questions and sends complex cases to a person.
Contact details are captured in an organised format.
Requests route by type and importance.
Leads connect to the right record without re-typing.
Messages send after clearly defined events.
Text and fields are prepared for human review.
Data becomes a concise, repeatable report.
Existing systems collaborate through secure connections.
ai-automation.advantageText: Faster responses, fewer lost requests and better process control create a practical competitive advantage.
advantages: Leads reach the right employee sooner.
Teams spend less time on repetitive work.

aiAutomationVisual.heroAlt: Human and robotic hands connecting through a digital data network
aiAutomationVisual.workflowText: Requests follow defined rules, move into the right system and involve a person whenever judgement is needed.
aiAutomationVisual.salesAlt: Business manager using AI indicators for sales and marketing workflows
aiAutomationVisual.salesText: An assistant helps the team understand needs, collect contact details and organise handoff through the CRM.
aiAutomationVisual.salesBoundary: A person makes the final decision
aiAutomationVisual.supportAlt: Visual model of an AI assistant in a technology workspace
aiAutomationVisual.supportText: The assistant searches approved knowledge and routes complex or uncertain requests to the right person.
aiAutomationVisual.integrationsText: Forms, messages and data can connect to existing business tools through secure, supported APIs.
aiAutomationVisual.integrationsDisclaimer: Available connections depend on each system’s API and access permissions.
aiAutomationVisual.documentsText: An AI-assisted flow helps extract text, prepare fields and route documents into the right system.
aiAutomationVisual.documentsBoundary: A person reviews accuracy, especially for critical information.
aiAutomationVisual.reportsAlt: AI dashboard with business data and workflow charts
aiAutomationVisual.reportsDisclaimer: The interface uses demo states only and does not represent real business results.
aiAutomationVisual.recommendationsAlt: AI data intelligence interface above a laptop keyboard
aiAutomationVisual.recommendationsText: Suggestions are based on available data, your catalogue and clearly defined business rules.
aiAutomationVisual.languagesText: Requests arrive in Georgian, English or Russian and route to the right person in the right language.
aiAutomationVisual.processText: Automation starts with understanding the workflow, selecting measurable opportunities and testing each stage responsibly.
aiAutomationVisual.finalText: Let’s discuss repetitive work, an AI assistant or a system connection that creates measurable business value.

healthcareVisual.heroAlt: Doctor discussing consultation details with a patient in a calm clinic setting
healthcareVisual.doctorsText: Profiles connect specialty, experience, location and availability so patients can make informed choices.
healthcareVisual.teamAlt: Professional medical team wearing clinical uniforms
healthcareVisual.servicesText: Categories and concise descriptions help patients identify the right service and prepare for booking.
healthcareVisual.servicesDisclaimer: Services and durations are interface examples only.
healthcareVisual.journeyText: Clear steps connect patients with the right service, doctor and time without an unnecessary call.
healthcareVisual.interiorAlt: Bright reception and consultation area in a private clinic
healthcareVisual.bookingDisclaimer: This interface demo does not submit a real appointment.
healthcareVisual.automationText: Potential integrations help teams manage requests, calendars and reminders through one connected workflow.
healthcareVisual.automationDisclaimer: Availability depends on the clinic’s systems and selected integrations.
healthcareVisual.aiText: AI can guide patients through clinic information and booking within clearly defined administrative boundaries.
healthcareVisual.aiBoundary: AI does not diagnose, prescribe treatment or replace a medical professional.
healthcareVisual.branchAlt: Main entrance of a medical centre
healthcareVisual.finalText: Let’s discuss how doctor profiles and online booking can simplify patient choice and day-to-day administration.

ecommerceVisual.heroAlt: Fashion product catalogue open on a laptop at a workspace
ecommerceVisual.discoveryText: Search, filters, variants and live stock information help customers make confident choices sooner.
ecommerceVisual.catalogAlt: Digital supermarket catalogue displayed on a laptop
ecommerceVisual.journeyText: One connected flow removes unnecessary steps and guides customers clearly through every purchase stage.
ecommerceVisual.paymentAlt: Customer paying by card in an online store on a laptop
ecommerceVisual.ordersText: A single dashboard connects orders, stock, fulfilment and sales visibility into one operational workflow.
ecommerceVisual.ordersAlt: Mini shopping cart filled with parcels beside a laptop
ecommerceVisual.aiAlt: Digital fashion recommendations displayed above a tablet
ecommerceVisual.aiText: AI helps customers find relevant products from your real catalogue and reduces repetitive work for the team.
ecommerceVisual.aiOutcome: Faster choice · less manual work · more reasons to return
ecommerceVisual.deliveryText: Clear statuses show both the team and the customer where an order is and what happens next.
ecommerceVisual.finalText: Let’s discuss how an online store can simplify product choice, ordering and your team’s day-to-day work.

tourismVisual.heroAlt: Hikers overlooking cloud-covered mountain peaks from a high alpine trail
tourismVisual.destinationsText: Clear categories, rich visuals and complete details help travellers find the right experience sooner.
tourismVisual.adventureAlt: Backpacker watching sunrise over a wide mountain landscape
tourismVisual.romeAlt: The Colosseum in Rome under soft morning light
tourismVisual.cultureAlt: Traveller exploring a historic street in an eastern city
tourismVisual.journeyText: One visual flow makes choices easier and removes uncertainty at every booking step.
tourismVisual.aiText: AI helps customers find suitable tours and daily plans from your real catalogue. Travellers remain in control of every choice.
tourismVisual.aiSuggestion: A balanced seven-day route combining cultural highlights and nature.
tourismVisual.languagesText: Localised tours, navigation and FAQs help international travellers decide with confidence.
tourismVisual.chatbot: FAQs and chat in the traveller’s language
tourismVisual.finalText: Let’s discuss how a clear catalogue and simple booking can turn traveller interest into direct enquiries.

constructionVisual.heroAlt: Wide front view of a contemporary stone villa with a pool
constructionVisual.galleryText: Strong photography communicates a project’s scale, character and build quality before the first conversation.
constructionVisual.galleryPrimaryAlt: Rear view of a contemporary white and glass villa
constructionVisual.galleryVillaAlt: Architectural rendering of a dark geometric villa
constructionVisual.galleryResidenceAlt: Contemporary urban residence viewed from the street
constructionVisual.selectorText: A visual selector guides buyers to available units and sends the sales team a precise enquiry.
constructionVisual.selectorAlt: Contemporary office building presented on a neutral background
constructionVisual.showcaseText: Description, photography, specifications, location and enquiry form on one page help buyers decide sooner.
constructionVisual.showcaseAlt: Full villa facade with landscaping and a pool
constructionVisual.mobileText: Browsing units and sending an enquiry remains fast and clear on a small screen.
constructionVisual.mobileAlt: Mobile presentation of a contemporary residential project
